parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Discord channel through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise discord:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored webhook; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment webhooks via parameters.

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Discord webhook id

webhook_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Discord webhook token
